title: Hoth agent configuration (agent.jsonc)
description: Per-agent config in agents/<name>/agent.jsonc. The file is REQUIRED: folders without it are skipped by the bundler. Skills live in agents/<name>/skills/<skill>/; an optional INSTRUCTIONS.md next to this file is appended to `instructions`.

instructions.description: Agent instructions. An optional INSTRUCTIONS.md in the same folder is appended after this text. At least one of the two must yield non-empty instructions.

model.description: Model specifier. If the first path segment is a known provider (openrouter, custom, cloudflare) the value is used as-is; otherwise 'openrouter/' is prepended (e.g. 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash' -> 'openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash'). Omit to use the backend's env-derived default (LLM_PROVIDER/LLM_MODEL).

model_base_url.description: Overrides the provider base URL for this agent (an OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Auth still uses the backend's LLM_API_KEY secret.
